name: 💡 Feature Request

## 💡 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## 🤔 Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Is it related to a frustration?

## 📐 Proposed Solution

How should this feature work? Include mockups, diagrams, or pseudocode if helpful.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

What other approaches have you considered?

## 📋 Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or references about the feature request.
